channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Persistent throwing of litter from parked cars, 30th May
item.description:
Almost daily dumping of litter from cars, usually water bottles, fried chicken boxes, plastic meal cartons, drinks cans. All along the street (Farquhar Road, Jasper Road).Do people realise this is illegal..... there's no deterrent. There should be more public bins however there are wheelie bins easily accessible on the pavement and a bin on opposite side of road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 49-55, Farquhar Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin needs emptying, 30th May
item.description:
The bin next to the ‘long lane’ bus stop on Erith Road is too full to use and rubbish is therefore being thrown on the pavement. This has been the case for a number of days. Please can a street cleansing operative empty the bin. Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Erith Road, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overcrowded Lime Hire Bikes left abandoned, parked dangerously, 30th May
item.description:
Overcrowded Lime Hire Bikes left abandoned, parked dangerously and Blocked off the pavement completely, Swiss Court TWG Tea.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Whitcomb Street, Covent Garden, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 30th May
item.description:
A neighbour keeps dumping rubbish outside our house i am sick of it

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brendon Close, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Park, 30th May
item.description:
In the children’s park the roundabout still not fixed and the spinning seesaw is so noisy that my child is scared of it Parks are importance to child especially in these times when finances do not stretch to payed activities The least we should expect are safe, clean maintained parks
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chieveley Road, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Waste has not been collected today, 30th May
item.description:
Has not been regular collection of today’s today

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 23, Meeting House Lane, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish at junction of Bury Road and Whymark Avenue, 30th May
item.description:
Lots of rubbish at junction of Bury Road and Whymark Avenue

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 26, Whymark Avenue, Harringay, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Slide needs a good clean, 30th May
item.description:
Sap /bird mess from the tree has made the slide sticky
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St Mary's Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped Van, 30th May
item.description:
Dumped van. No mot

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bromley Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing litter bins, 30th May
item.description:
When, oh when, will the council get the bins outside 4 & 6 Kelsey Park Road emptied? It seems almost every week I have to send a report on the disgusting state these bins are causing to the pavement. Why can't they be emptied on a more regular basis? PLEASE empty them. I get fed up with seeing this filth for days on end from my house. There is also a nitrous oxide gas cylinder in the road gutter from drug takers.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Kelsey Park Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 3 garden waste sacks dumped outside grow box garden on Shrubland Road, 30th May
item.description:
3 garden waste sacks dumped outside grow box garden on Shrubland Rd
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shrubland Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Manhole is bent, 30th May
item.description:
There is a few manholes that are wobbly
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Fallow Court Avenue, Fallow Corner, Greater London

item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Waterman's Way, Rotherhithe, Greater London

item.title: Concrete has given way surrounding manhole cover, 30th May
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Havil Street, Camberwell, Greater London

item.title: Loud banging all day and night, 30th May

item.title: Blocked road side gully, 30th May
item.description:
Blocked roadside gully, this is in red lion place behind 39 shooters hill near the garages and alleyway

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shooters Hill, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Stoney Alley blocked by ivy clad branch, 30th May
item.description:
Stoney Alley, accessed from opposite The Bull Pub, has been substantially blocked by a tree or branch covered in ivy that has fallen across the route near the point where the path opens to Jack Wood. It is above head height so not able to be addressed by volunteers.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kenilworth Gardens, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Weeding, 30th May
item.description:
Weeding needed gothic cort, middle area

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bowyer Street, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
